entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: An oilseed crop produced extensively in China and subject to aflatoxin contamination.

entities.name: CHINA
entities.description: A country where groundnut is a major oilseed crop and where research on aflatoxin resistance is conducted.

entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: The presence of aflatoxins in groundnut products, affecting food safety and market competitiveness.

entities.name: FOOD SAFETY
entities.description: A concern related to the presence of aflatoxin contamination in food products.

entities.name: MARKET COMPETITIVENESS
entities.description: A factor impacted by the level of aflatoxin contamination in groundnut products.

entities.name: WARM REGIONS
entities.description: Geographic areas characterized by serious heat and drought stresses.

entities.name: HEAT STRESS
entities.description: An environmental stressor common in warm regions that affects groundnut.

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: An environmental stressor common in warm regions that affects groundnut.

entities.name: AFLATOXIN RESISTANCE
entities.description: The genetic ability of a plant to resist aflatoxin contamination.

entities.name: GROUNDNUT GERMPLASMS
entities.description: Genetic resources, including core collections from China, ICRISAT, and USA, used to identify resistant lines.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: An international organization providing core collections and breeding lines for groundnut improvement.

entities.name: USA
entities.description: A country providing core collections of groundnut germplasms.

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS
entities.description: A fungus responsible for infection and aflatoxin production in groundnut.

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS INFECTION
entities.description: The process of groundnut plants being infected by Aspergillus species.

entities.name: AFLATOXIN PRODUCTION
entities.description: The biological process by which Aspergillus produces aflatoxins.

entities.name: SHELL RESISTANCE
entities.description: A specific resistance mechanism where the groundnut shell prevents Aspergillus infection.

entities.name: ZHONGHUA 6
entities.description: An elite groundnut cultivar developed at OCRI-CAAS with resistance to aflatoxin, bacterial wilt, and pot rot.

entities.name: BACTERIAL WILT
entities.description: A plant disease to which the cultivar Zhonghua 6 is resistant.

entities.name: POT ROT
entities.description: A plant disease to which the cultivar Zhonghua 6 is resistant.

entities.name: CENTRAL CHINA
entities.description: The region where the cultivar Zhonghua 6 is extensively used.

entities.name: RNA-SEQ PROFILING
entities.description: A sequencing method used to identify the molecular mechanisms of aflatoxin resistance in Zhonghua 6.

entities.name: RESVERATROL CONTENT
entities.description: A biochemical attribute in Zhonghua 6 that serves as a key mechanism for reducing aflatoxin production.
